core_mechanism: an iterable solution-generating (Darboux/Moutard-type) transformation that maps a known solution of a nonlinear governing equation to a new one, driven algebraically by a noncommutative determinant/Pfaffian analog that obeys a Sylvester-type block-decomposition identity
brief_reason: The abstract builds a Sylvester identity for a quasi-Pfaffian (a noncommutative Pfaffian analog) into a Sylvester-Moutard transform that generates new solutions of Moutard-transformable systems, i.e. a Darboux-type dressing map powered by a Sylvester block identity.
